positive: A highly detailed, stylized cosmic forest scene viewed from a central, symmetrical perspective. Feature luminous, bioluminescent flora mixed with abstract constellations and galactic dust. The composition should be dominated by clean, flowing silhouettes of stylized trees and nebulous patterns. Color palette: deep indigo, vibrant cyan, electric lime green, and soft gold, creating a strong contrast against a dark void background. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets sci-fi concept art, vector-graphic quality, highly clean edges, perfect symmetry, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on clear lines and graphic impact.
negative: blur, artifact, low detail, text, signature, watermark, logo, ugly, noise, bad anatomy, cropped, extra limbs, sketch, pencil, realistic photo, grayscale, messy, cluttered background
